title: Quirky Vehicles Framework
description: Mod framework providing tools for easier implementation of multipart and multiplayer-movable vehicles
body:
This is a framework for mod developers containing some reusable tools for creating steerable vehicles made of multiple parts (sub-entities like the Ender Dragon body segments).

If you're looking for mods utilising this framework, check out [Boats but long](https://modrinth.com/mod/boats-but-long)
